original_statement: how many players were drafted in the third round?
mutated_statement: how many participants were drafted and undrafted in the third round?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Category addition (scope expansion) + Semantic/contradiction: "players" → "participants" | addition of "and undrafted" expands scope to count both drafted and undrafted and creates ambiguity/contradiction about being "undrafted in the third round" (how many players were drafted in the third round? → how many participants were drafted and undrafted in the third round?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 - 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息：日志明确写到“第三轮有两条记录（Dez White 和 Dustin Lyman），表格未列出任何第三轮的未被选中者，因此未被选中为0”，并且最终输出“2|0”。Agent在面对“players → participants”与“and undrafted”产生的语义矛盾时，没有报错或请求澄清，而是基于数据表结构与事实推理解释矛盾：表中只有被选中的条目，因而将“undrafted in the third round”合理化为数量为0。该行为属于通过逻辑/数据说明来化解矛盾，而不是忽视或重写指令，符合“合理化矛盾指令”下的“逻辑解释合理化”子类。
